LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APRIL 30, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 2, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $519.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE MAR-20-2013, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT FILED A FORM ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT; HOWEVER, EXCEPT FOR FILLING IN HIS NAME, THE ENTIRE ANSWER IS BLANK. DEFENDANT FAILED TO DENY ANY OF THE MATERIAL ALLEGATIONS AGAINST HIM, AND DID NOT RAISE ANY DEFENSES. FURTHER, NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO THIS MOTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings IS Granted. Defendant filed a form Answer to the Complaint; however, except for filling in his name, the entire Answer is blank. Defendant failed to deny any of the material allegations against him, and did not raise any defenses. Further, no opposition filed was filed to this motion. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued on the court's own motion to April 30, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 2, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
